summary: After Fast or Deep scans finish, DiskWise notifies you about Safe to Clean folders and lets you move them to Trash straight from the notification.
introduced: Scan cleanup notifications — after a volume Fast or Deep scan completes, alerts appear for Safe to Clean recommendations (caches, logs, temp exports, node_modules, APFS snapshots)
Notification actions — Move to Trash or Thin Snapshots runs cleanup immediately; Review in DiskWise opens the Breakdown tab
changed: Settings → Notifications — new Disk Analysis toggle to enable or disable post-scan cleanup alerts (on by default)
